rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target implementation only when the contract binds to implementation-level features or constraints.
generic_rules: Preserve the AADL component type and implementation hierarchy when inserting annexes.
Ensure annex content reflects the scope of the target—type-level for abstract properties, implementation-level for bound expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` to enclose contract blocks.
Comparison expressions must return bool; use explicit equality equations for range checks.
anti_patterns: Do not inject type-level contracts into implementation annexes unless binding to implementation-specific values.
